name: AREthAddField
title: AREthAddField
syntax: dword AREthAddField( dword psiHandle, long notificationId, long getterId, long setterId );
description: This function adds a field to a Provided Service Instance that was created by AREthCreateProvidedServiceInstance.
Field contents can be set using the corresponding access functions (AREthSetValue...). These changes are only applied when the AREthCommitField is called.
A field can be removed again using the AREthRemoveField function.

parameters.name: psiHandle
parameters.description: Handle of the Provided Service Instance that was created with AREthCreateConsumerServiceInstance.

return: 0: An error occurred. The error can be evaluated using the AREthGetLastError function.

description: In this example, it is assumed that the utilized field is contained in the FIBEX database that is assigned to the CANoe configuration. The field has the Notification ID 30, the Getter ID 31, and the Setter ID 32. The data type of the field is a standard data type (for example, UINT8).
